message:
Fix: Pin golangci-lint to v1.62.0 to unblock CI (#86)

Amp-Thread-ID: https://ampcode.com/threads/T-056a25c4-ad39-4124-99b8-b459b3e21305
Co-authored-by: Amp <amp@ampcode.com>

files.patch:
@@ -58,5 +58,5 @@ jobs:
       - name: golangci-lint
         uses: golangci/golangci-lint-action@v6
         with:
-          version: latest
+          version: v1.62.0
           args: --timeout=5m
